evidence.snippet: ot reached the defined position within the time limit of 1 second. intervention: Check any mechanical resistance to the rotation of the spindle, note the error code on the actuation identified with the acronym A2721 and consult the Fanuc 160i-TB maintenance manual responsible for the intervention: r
